tooltip.innovation_and_control.jagan_eye: §7Right-Click: Amplify / Shift+Right: Switch Mode / Right-Click at Max: Reset§r
tooltip.innovation_and_control.ring_of_c: §d"Defying all logic, dominating the peak of sorcery."§r
§b▷ Forbidden Mana Source: Negates Mana consumption for all spells.§r
§b▷ Temporal Distortion: Drastically reduces Cast Time and Cooldowns.§r
§c※He who wields this power shall shatter the balance of the world.§r
§a▷ Consuming high-concentration GN particles to surpass the limits of all slots.§r
msg.innovation_and_control.gn_drink.succ: GN Particles, max output! All Curios slots have been expanded.
item.innovation_and_control.primitive_bo: 【 Story of the End, Written by the Ancient Dragon 】
"This book shall consume every story ever told."
▷ Primitive Consumption: Devours and mimics spells from other Spellbooks in Curios slots.
chat.innovation_and_control.already_lear: ▷ That story has already been chronicled...
